# CWE-1230 vulnerable: leaks document metadata
lang: go
file: CWE-1230-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1230: Exposure of Sensitive Information Through Metadata.
// Vulnerable: redacted download still returns original filename and byte length.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func DownloadRedacted() gin.HandlerFunc {
	base := "/var/vault/documents"
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		name := c.Param("name")
		path := filepath.Join(base, name)
		info, err := os.Stat(path)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
			return
		}
		c.Header("X-Original-Name", name)
		c.Header("X-File-Size", string(rune(info.Size())))
		c.String(http.StatusOK, "[REDACTED CONTENT]")
	}
}
